title: Derfic's techno modpack
description: Light modpack: Create, Immersive Engineering, AE 2
body:
Lightweight Modpack: Create, Immersive Engineering, AE 2

This modpack is designed for those who love automation, engineering, and efficient resource management. It combines some of the best mods for creating complex mechanisms, automating production, and managing energy.
Key Mods:
- Create: Adds a plethora of mechanical blocks and tools that allow you to create complex mechanisms and automated systems. Perfect for those who love to tinker and experiment.
- Immersive Engineering: Introduces new machines and mechanisms that enable the creation of complex engineering systems. Great for those who enjoy technical and automated setups.
- Applied Energistics 2: Adds an energy and automation system that allows for the creation of complex networks for storing and processing resources. Ideal for those who enjoy efficient resource management.

Why Download This Modpack?
- Automation: Allows you to create fully automated factories and systems.
- Engineering: Adds a multitude of new machines and mechanisms for creating complex engineering systems.
- Resource Management: Enables efficient management of resources and energy.

This modpack is perfect for those who enjoy building, automating, and experimenting with new mechanisms and systems.
